hooks.command: node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const p=JSON.parse(d);const f=p.tool_input?.file_path||p.tool_input?.notebook_path||'';process.stdout.write(f);});" | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && npm run biome:fix -- "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
